query:
SELECT 
  p.priority,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  GROUP_CONCAT(p.name ORDER BY p.name SEPARATOR ' | ') as projects
FROM projects p
WHERE JSON_CONTAINS(p.matchedBusinessLines, '90002')
AND p.lifecycleStatus NOT IN ('stale', 'cancelled', 'completed')
GROUP BY p.priority;
